description: A jersey that breathes through the mesh sides for superior ventilation Round necked, loose Fit t-shirt for ease of movement Composition 100% polyester This sport t-shirt is designed for all the Sports buffs as well as the dudes who want to look sporty! Designed for amateur sportsmen of all ages, it assists fast moisture transfer. This garment is designed specifically for men. It is an ideal training garment for all sports.   Is there anyone out there who wouldn't wear a T-shirt? Hmm...Well it's a no-brainer that everyone simply loves t-shirts. It's the one outfit that make you look every bit cool, casual and chic. t-shirts are inherently appealing with its colours, designs and versatility. They can be worn for any occasion- anytime, anywhere. T-shirts are available in various fits and sizes for men, women and kids. Its a great casual wear that keeps you comfortable all day. The ease of use and long lasting nature of t-shirts make it a favourite wear for one and all. Get into a t-shirt, close your eyes and you will realize it feels really good.
